vocab.cache: SET key value EX seconds. GET key. Cache-aside: check Redis → on miss, fetch DB → SET result. HSET/HGET for structured data.
vocab.sessions: SETEX session_id ttl serialized_json. Use ioredis with connect-redis for Express session middleware.
vocab.queue: BullMQ library (recommended over raw Redis). new Queue('name'). new Worker('name', processor). Automatic retries and DLQ.
vocab.pubsub: PUBLISH channel message. SUBSCRIBE channel. Use separate ioredis connections for pub and sub.
vocab.rate-limiting: INCR key + EXPIRE key seconds. Or sliding window with ZADD + ZCOUNT. ioredis-rate-limiter-flexible library.
